title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. decolorans
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. decolorans, commonly known as Orange Hawk's Beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. decolorans include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can help prevent infection. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for use in herbal medicine, although it is essential to consult with a qualified healthcare practitioner before using it for medicinal purposes.
